title: phyllanthus gardnerianus
intro: Phyllanthus gardnerianus, also known as the West African phyllanthus or the Garden's leaf, is a plant species in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in West Africa, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus gardnerianus include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and aid in the treatment of various infections, such as malaria and tuberculosis. The plant is often prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
intro_study: According to "Evidence-based complementary and alternative medicine : eCAM", Phyllanthus gardnerianus benefits from its isolation of compounds such as lignins, triterpenoids, flavonoids, and tannins, which have shown remarkable antiviral, antioxidant, antidiabetic, and anticancer activities.
